calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
James Ignatius Fisher, Esq. for Plaintiff Sara Shapiro, also present, was sworn & examined.
Plaintiff's witness: Jerry Stone present, was sworn and examined.
Plaintiff's witness: Tom Hong Chen present with Cantoneses Interpreter: Amy Lo, sworn and examined.
Exh. 1 - Agreement for Project Service dated 7-27-02 ---- ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Listing of Defects dated 01-07-03 ---------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 3 - Copy of checks (12 pg)---------------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 4 - Invoices (8 pg) ---------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 5 - Jams & Door Construction Inspection -------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Kan Yin Chow as follows: Principal of $79,119.09, no punitive damages awarded.
The Court awarded interest and costs, amount to be documented by Mr. Fisher, and to be submitted to the court for approval with the Judgment.
Counsel stiupulated for the return of the exhibits in open court.

April 23, 2004
Declaration RE: Costs and Prejudment Interest rec'd in court.
Judgment granted for Prejudgment Interest of $9,428.80, Costs $484.50.
Fro the total Judgment of $89,032.39
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
